title: AdvanceTAB
description: A highly customizable tab list plugin with animations and placeholders for Minecraft 1.20–1.21.8.
body:
AdvancedTab is a powerful and lightweight Minecraft plugin that lets you fully customize the player tab list.

Features:

🎨 Customizable Tab Layout – Add text, placeholders, player info, and more

⚡ Smooth Animations – Make your tab list look professional with animated titles

🛠 PlaceholderAPI Support – Use placeholders for player stats, server info, ranks, etc.

🌍 Multi-Version Support – Works on Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21.8 (Paper/Spigot/Folia)

🔧 Easy Configuration – Simple config.yml for quick setup and updates

📊 Performance Optimized – Lightweight and lag-free, even on large servers


Perfect for:

Survival, SMP, and Factions servers

Mini-game networks

Any server that wants a clean, professional-looking tab list


Why Use AdvancedTab?
Your tab list is one of the first things players see — make it look great!
AdvancedTab helps you create a unique server experience with minimal setup and maximum customization.
